understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver pushable objects or selectables onto goal tiles marked with '+', as seen in the semantic grid, possibly requiring coordination between multiple selectable pieces.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shifted the currently selected piece in the specified direction, sometimes pushing adjacent pushable blocks if present. Walls, represented by '#', blocked movement and sometimes forced alternate paths. Selectable pieces could be switched via the CLICK action by specifying their exact pixel/grid position. Efficient planning and coordination were necessary due to a step limit per level.
